'''Teya IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Teya system/Legends|Teya system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] and was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Strak]]. It was where [[Willm Lywin]] founded the [[Teyan Praxeum]] in [[4600 BBY]]. In [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], Mistress [[Tannis (Jedi)|Tannis]] taught [[Vici Ramunee]] and [[Veni Ramunee]] at the Praxeum. This is where the ''[[Teyan Apologia]]'' was written. The planet was made up of many villages and hamlets, with no real colonization.
